instruction: When was the experiment box born? Answer YYYY-MM-DD. Date only
notes: Foundry entity (the only 'experiment box' candidate by description 'Loud lab box where risky experiments happen') has TWO date fields: created_on=2026-03-23 and commissioned_on=2025-10-19. Neither is named 'born' or 'birthday'. Per the existing date-substitution rule, the agent must report OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION rather than substitute one of the two fields. Agent in bench7 picked created_on heuristically and answered 2026-03-23 (rule violation: 'created_on is NOT a birthday').
